results.title: Trump signals optimism, but still hasn't signed off on an Iran peace framework - Fri, 29 May 2026 PST
results.description: WASHINGTON — A framework agreement to end the U.S. war with Iran is all but settled, pending sign-off from the presidents of the two warring sides, President Donald Trump said Friday, projecting optimism that a deal could finally be at hand.

results.title: Honda Vietnam accelerates electrification strategy
results.description: Under the plan, all newly manufactured and distributed internal combustion engine motorcycles from fiscal year 2027, starting from April 1 2026 to March 31, 2027, will meet Euro 4 emission standards in line with the Government’s emissions control roadmap. results.title: Rating governance for history
results.description: Surveying public satisfaction with the president has been done by Social Weather Stations (SWS), regularly and consistently, for four decades now. The new report, “First Quarter 2026 Social Weather Survey: net satisfaction with President Marcos falls from -3 in November 2025 to -15 in March 2026” (sws.org.ph, 5/26/26), is but the latest in a series [...]... results.title: Volume 270, No. 19
results.description: We are not so delusional as to think that The Greatest President Ever is aware of our existence. And we are certainly not members of the charmed circle of intimates for whom he will do unseemly favors. Nevertheless, though inadvertently, he did us a favor recently. Usually it takes a bit of thought to pick a topic for the rant. Let it be known, though, there’s a $1,766,666,666 slush fund for traitors, and that question is done and dusted. To read about that, and other some shenanigans, just give this link a click.

results.title: Sacked Pam Bondi refuses to answer Trump questions in Epstein probe
results.description: The former US attorney-general, who was fired by Trump over her handling of the Epstein files, appeared before a Congressional committee but refused to answer questions about Donald Trump.

results.title: Clarksville senior center director fired ahead of city takeover
results.description: The Ajax Turner Senior Center board voted to fire Executive Director Rita Allsop as the center prepares for a city takeover on June 30.

results.title: Brokerages Want Antitrust Suit Paused Due To Pending Deal
Pork import rules drafted amid inflation fears
results.description: The Department of Agriculture is drafting rules for Executive Order No. 116, which increases pork import allocations to address supply shortages and stabilize food prices while balancing the interests of consumers, local hog raisers, and the domestic swine industry's recovery from African Swine Fever.

results.title: Police watchdog investigating Winnipeg hostage situation that resulted in gunfire
results.description: Manitoba’s police watchdog is investigating after Winnipeg police exchanged gunfire with a man who allegedly took three people hostage inside a home Friday afternoon.
